summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Vendor Hiring Dashboard MVP. All core functionality working correctly with 36 candidates loaded from Excel file.

design_issues.issue: Logout functionality not clearly visible - no obvious logout button or user dropdown menu
Modal overlay can block navigation temporarily - needs better close handling

passed_tests: Home dashboard KPI cards display (36 candidates, 5 openings, 8 interviews, 0 selected)
Charts rendering (Pipeline by Stage, Vendor Contributions)
Analysis page with vendor performance metrics
All backend API endpoints (10/10 tests passed)
action_item_for_main_agent: Add clear logout functionality - either a visible logout button or a proper user dropdown menu with logout option. The current implementation makes it unclear how users can log out of the system.
